openFindings.title: description.json parentChain still points at the pre-renumbered phase segment
openFindings.description: The packet now lives under 001-search-and-routing-tuning, but description.json still records 010-search-and-routing-tuning in parentChain, so metadata no longer mirrors the canonical packet path.

openFindings.title: graph-metadata key_files includes a non-existent test path
openFindings.description: key_files lists tests/handler-memory-save.vitest.ts, but the actual repo-relative path is .opencode/skill/system-spec-kit/mcp_server/tests/handler-memory-save.vitest.ts.

openFindings.title: graph-metadata entity path drops the system-spec-kit prefix
openFindings.description: The derived memory-save.ts entity is stored as mcp_server/handlers/memory-save.ts, which is not the real repo-relative path and breaks path-level traceability for this packet.

openFindings.title: Packet task IDs do not match the routed task_update contract
openFindings.description: This packet uses T-01/T-02/T-V1 notation, while the level-2 task template and routed merge code only recognize T### and CHK-### identifiers. The packet therefore cannot act as a faithful self-specimen for the guard it documents.

openFindings.title: Implementation summary carries a stale failing-suite limitation
openFindings.description: The packet says the broad handler-memory-save suite still has unrelated failures, but the current full suite passes. The limitation block is now stale and misdirects future verification work.

transitions.reason: Tentative packet-maintenance concern pending live replay
